commands.test_full: cargo test --workspace (requires network for goose git dep + dbus for keyring)
commands.notes: Full workspace build requires: libxcb1-dev, libdbus-1-dev, pkg-config, network access for goose git dep. Only opengoose-types, opengoose-profiles, opengoose-persistence can be tested in sandboxed env. opengoose-web fails with v8 download error.

testing_notes.infrastructure_notes: test_db() helper is duplicated across ~7 persistence module test blocks; ensure_session() duplicated in 3 places (message_queue, orchestration, work_items). Both are mild code smells - could be extracted to a shared test_helpers module in lib.rs #[cfg(test)]. Not urgent; offline test landscape well-saturated.
testing_notes.note: Offline test landscape well-saturated. Maintainer added significant tests on 2026-03-10 (persistence 75→122, profiles 53→71, types 60→66). YamlStoreError consolidation done (issue #51 closed, PR #96 merged). opengoose-web getting tests too but not testable in sandbox.

completed_work.description: Task 6: Assessed test infrastructure in opengoose-persistence. test_db() helper duplicated ~7 times, ensure_session() duplicated 3 times. Noted as mild code smell; no PR needed as impact low and maintainer is actively adding tests.
Task 5: Commented on issue #51 (Duplicate Error Enums) noting test duplication angle and refactoring guidance.

Added 2 tests directly to main: StreamStarted/Updated/Completed Display (opengoose-types: 59→60) + empty GOOSE_RECIPE_PATH guard (opengoose-profiles: 52→53). No PR was created - tests landed directly on main.
Added 4 tests: YamlFileStore::list() extension filtering (3 tests) + WorkItemStore::set_input() (1 test)

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-core SessionManager - needs DB and EventBus, complex cache-DB consistency logic, no tests. Blocked by goose network dep.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-teams chain/router/fan_out executors - complex orchestration logic, existing tests only cover basics.
testing_backlog.notes: Cannot test in sandbox - needs network for goose dep

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-persistence test_db()/ensure_session() duplication - consider extracting to shared test_helpers module in lib.rs #[cfg(test)]
testing_backlog.notes: Mild code smell only; 7 duplicates of test_db(), 3 of ensure_session()

testing_backlog.item: opengoose-secrets keyring_backend MockStore patterns could be extended
